Name: Anvil F7C-M Super Hornet Mk II
Description:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Medium Fighter
 
Refining their renowned military-class superiority fighter with the most up-to-date technology, Anvil Aerospace has crafted the F7C-M Super Hornet Mk II,  retaining the second seat and ball turret that made the original a truly terrifying mark to engage.
